scan_metadata.verification_method: Unified canonical spec: dead iff (no production use) AND (no test use, where import-only/comments/docstrings/exception-strings/type-annotations excluded) AND (no test failure on deletion).
scan_metadata.verification: 4-round 10-verification convergence: bailian + kimi + GLM triple-core + 5 reverse/forward/cross checks + unified spec application
scan_metadata.v5_canonical_spec: Mechanical decision tree with no exceptions for tautological assertions or symbolic references. DOMAIN/RESOURCE judged ALIVE per spec condition 2 (actual attribute access in test) and condition 3 (test failure on deletion).
scan_metadata.v5_changes_from_v4: DOMAIN/RESOURCE removed (alive per spec); _sample and _section added (previously missed).

truly_dead_code_summary.false_positive_rate: 65.9% (85 of 129 vulture entries are not truly dead; arithmetic: 129 - 44 truly_dead = 85)
truly_dead_code_summary.v5_changes: v4 had 44 with DOMAIN/RESOURCE misclassified; v5 swaps them out for _sample/_section, total remains 44 but composition changed
